entity: Shaquille O'Neal All-NBA selections = 14 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM stg_bref_end_of_season_teams WHERE nba_player_id = 406 AND lg = 'NBA' AND type = 'All-NBA'

notes: Shaquille O'Neal's 14 All-NBA selections (8 First Team, 3 Second Team, 3 Third Team). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 14. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
